nodes.name: Input
nodes.description: Where the automation receives its work — a message, a request, or a scheduled tick.
nodes.instruction: Receive the incoming request as it is and name it for the nodes downstream.
nodes.summary: Takes the raw request and passes it on as payload.

functions.name: receiveRequest
functions.summary: Takes the raw incoming request and names it for the nodes downstream.
functions.accepts: The raw request as it arrived from the channel.

nodes.name: Logic
nodes.description: The middle — the deterministic work that turns the input into the output.
nodes.instruction: Turn the incoming payload into the automation's result.
nodes.summary: Turns payload into result; no transformation of its own yet.

functions.name: transformPayload
functions.summary: Turns the incoming payload into the automation's result.
functions.accepts: payload — whatever the input node produced.
functions.returns: result — the value the output node delivers.

nodes.name: Output
nodes.description: Where the automation delivers its result — a reply, a saved record, or a published page.
nodes.instruction: Deliver the result where the automation is supposed to deliver it.
nodes.summary: Delivers the result; the destination channel is not chosen yet.

functions.name: deliverResult
functions.summary: Delivers the automation's result to its destination.
functions.accepts: result — the value produced by the middle of the flow.
functions.returns: Nothing — an output node ends the flow.
